name: @leo/tokens
description: Shared design tokens for web and native

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/build.cjs && node scripts/build-tailwind.cjs && node scripts/build-icons.cjs && node scripts/build-illustrations.cjs
scripts.token:build: node scripts/build.cjs && node scripts/build-tailwind.cjs && node scripts/build-icons.cjs && node scripts/build-illustrations.cjs
scripts.token:generate: node scripts/fetch.cjs && node scripts/build.cjs && node scripts/build-tailwind.cjs && node scripts/build-icons.cjs && node scripts/build-illustrations.cjs
